title: Good: HTTP Signature verification fails closed on key fetch failure
description: In handle_inbox, if the actor key cannot be fetched the code returns 401 UNAUTHORIZED rather than accepting the request. The retry-after-invalidation path also fails closed. This is the correct behavior for a security gate: an unreachable key registry must not allow unauthenticated messages through. The same pattern is applied consistently in actor_cache.rs where a private-host SSRF would return an error rather than silently succeeding.
